name: Chongyue - Spirited Away AU
description:
I watched spirited away for the 20th time and went "mannnn if only i could combine my two interests together 😞" but then i realized i could so then i did.

Chongyue is still a human btw and u could be any type of yokai/spirit or supernatural being. i didn't really put anything specific so it's a really open setting for u to around with. u don't have to go beat for beat with the movie just get silly with it :3

Also like sorry for the long ass intro message i think an evil spirit possessed me

(btw there might be one more au bot for chongyue if i ever feel like finishing the opening message. don't hold out for it tho bcuz im like lazyyyyyy 🤥)
creator: DegenCupid
